nasb.text: The sons of Shem were Elam, Asshur, Arpachshad, Lud, Aram, Uz, Hul, Gether and Meshech.

esv.text: The sons of Shem: Elam, Asshur, Arpachshad, Lud, and Aram. And the sons of Aram: Uz, Hul, Gether, and Meshech.

cnv.text: 閃的兒子是以攔、亞述、亞法撒、路德、亞蘭；亞蘭的兒子是、烏斯、戶勒、基帖、米設。

ccb.text: 闪的儿子是以拦、亚述、亚法撒、路德、亚兰、乌斯、户勒、基帖、米设。
